MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL TECHNICAL SECURITY SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND

Granted. Defendant Professional Technical Security Service (PTSS) has shown ample basis to set aside the default against it per Code of Civil Procedure 473(b). Plaintiff's arguments based on the Gordon Rees firm's asserted lack of authority to represent PTSS in this action lack merit.

Order is signed.
